ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server where the metric was collected */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the metric collection within the hour */,
  "usr" REAL /* User CPU usage (as a percentage) */,
  "sys" REAL /* System CPU usage (as a percentage) */,
  "iowait" REAL /* I/O wait time (as a percentage) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was collected */,
  "total" REAL /* Total CPU usage (as a percentage) */,
  "mem_usage" REAL /* Memory usage (as a percentage) */,
  "net_traffic" REAL /* Network traffic (in bytes) */,
  "disk_io" REAL /* Disk I/O (in bytes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data center where the server is located */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cluster where the server belongs */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system of the server */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the server */,
  "cpu_cores" INTEGER /* Number of CPU cores */,
  "memory_gb" INTEGER /* Total memory in gigabytes */,
  "disk_gb" INTEGER /* Total disk space in gigabytes */,
  "hardware_specs" TEXT /* Hardware specifications of the server */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_servers_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_servers_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_center_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("data_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_centers" (
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data center */,
  "data_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the data center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data center */,
  "physical_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the data center */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for inquiries about the data center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data center where the cluster is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clusters_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_center_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("data_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., usr, sys, iowait) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value at which the threshold is triggered */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the threshold */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences for the threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric that triggered the alert */,
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the threshold that was exceeded */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Resolution status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_threshold_id FOREIGN KEY ("threshold_id") REFERENCES alert_thresholds ("threshold_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, IT staff, system analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view report) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Details of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the server */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the summary */,
  "avg_usr" REAL /* Average user CPU usage */,
  "avg_sys" REAL /* Average system CPU usage */,
  "avg_iowait" REAL /* Average I/O wait time */,
  "avg_total" REAL /* Average total CPU usage */,
  "avg_mem_usage" REAL /* Average memory usage */,
  "avg_net_traffic" REAL /* Average network traffic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_summary_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
